  "order": [],

  "findings": [
    "Trip hazards from cords routed across active walkways",
    "Fall hazards due to missing guardrails on elevated work areas",
    "Blocked emergency egress routes and obstructed fire extinguishers",
    "Fall and structural collapse hazards from improvised, non-compliant scaffolds",
    "Unprotected and unattended open floor holes"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work immediately to address life-safety hazards",
    "Reroute or protect cords crossing walkways using cord covers or overhead suspension",
    "Install compliant guardrail systems or require 100% tie-off personal fall arrest systems",
    "Clear all blocked egress paths and ensure fire extinguishers are fully accessible",
    "Dismantle improvised scaffolds and erect compliant scaffolding under competent person supervision",
    "Cover and secure, or guard with standard railings, all open floor holes"
  ],
  "rationale": "The jobsite exhibits multiple critical safety violations including unmitigated fall hazards, structural scaffold deficiencies, and blocked emergency equipment/egress. These conditions present an immediate danger to life and health (IDLH) and violate basic OSHA standards, requiring an immediate stop-work order and corrective action.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA General Duty Clause Section 5(a)(1)",
    "29 CFR 1926 Subpart L (Scaffolds)",
    "29 CFR 1926.501 (Duty to have fall protection)",
    "29 CFR 1926.25 (Housekeeping)",
    "29 CFR 1926.150 (Fire protection)"
  ]
}
